main.subtitle: Global smooth scrolling. Press middle button and move.
main.hotkey_dialog.title: Set Shortcut
main.hotkey_dialog.hint:
Horizontal Mode
When enabled, FlowScroll can scroll horizontally or in any direction based on cursor movement. It is useful for spreadsheets, timelines, large canvases, and other wide layouts.

This shortcut is used to toggle Horizontal Mode. Leave it empty if you do not want a dedicated shortcut; you can still turn the mode on or off from the main window.
main.help.title: Feature Guide
main.help.html:
Parameter tuning guide
These controls change the scrolling feel, not the activation logic. Adjust one item at a time if you want predictable results.

{speed_icon} Sensitivity Curve
Controls how quickly speed ramps up as the cursor moves away from the center.
Lower values feel gentler. Higher values create a stronger acceleration effect and more contrast between short and long cursor movement.

{power_icon} Base Speed
Controls the overall scrolling strength.
If everything feels too slow or too fast, adjust this first. It is usually the most direct speed control.

{target_icon} Dead Zone
The safe area around the center where small hand movement does not start scrolling.
Increase it if you often trigger scrolling by accident or feel jitter near the center.

{move_icon} Horizontal Mode
Lets you scroll in any direction, not just up and down.
Useful for spreadsheets, timelines, large canvases, and other wide layouts. For normal reading, it is fine to leave it off.

Quick tuning tips
If scrolling feels too slow: raise Base Speed first.
If scrolling feels too fast: lower Base Speed first.
If the center feels too sensitive: increase Dead Zone.
If you want stronger speed layering: raise Sensitivity Curve.
main.toggle_horizontal.title: Horizontal Scroll
main.settings_failed.title: Failed
main.single_instance.title: Already Running
main.single_instance.body: FlowScroll is already running. The existing window has been brought to the foreground.
main.permission_denied.title: Permission Required
main.permission_denied.body: Failed to start global input hook service.
main.keyboard_hook_failed.title: Keyboard Hotkeys Unavailable
main.keyboard_hook_failed.body:
Keyboard hook startup failed. Keyboard hotkeys are unavailable, but mouse-based activation can still be used.

{detail}
main.mouse_hook_failed.title: Mouse Activation Unavailable
main.mouse_hook_failed.body:
Mouse hook startup failed. Middle-button and mouse-side-button activation are unavailable, but configured keyboard shortcuts can still be used.

{detail}
main.input_hook_failure_detail.windows: On Windows, this is usually caused by missing privileges, security software blocking input hooks, or the current environment disallowing global input interception. Try running as administrator and check whether security software blocked the app.
main.input_hook_failure_detail.macos: On macOS, this is usually related to Accessibility permission. Open System Settings -> Privacy & Security -> Accessibility, allow FlowScroll or its launcher to monitor input, then restart the app.
main.input_hook_failure_detail.linux_way: This looks like a Wayland session. Many Wayland desktops do not allow traditional global keyboard or mouse hooks, so this feature may be unavailable. Try an X11/Xorg session or check whether your desktop provides a compatible permission or protocol.
main.input_hook_failure_detail.linux_x11: This looks like an X11 session. Check whether the current launch method can access the graphical session and input devices, and whether any required input-related dependency is missing.
main.input_hook_failure_detail.linux_gen: On Linux, this is usually related to the current graphical session type, desktop permissions, or input-device access restrictions. Wayland sessions are especially likely to limit global hooks.
main.input_hook_failure_detail.generic: The current environment may not support the required global input hook capability, or the app may not have permission to monitor system input events.
main.input_status.keyboard_only_degraded: Keyboard hotkeys are currently unavailable. Middle-button and mouse-side-button activation can still be used.
main.input_status.mouse_only_degraded: Mouse-based activation is currently unavailable. Configured keyboard shortcuts can still be used.
main.input_status.all_unavailable: Both keyboard and mouse input hooks are currently unavailable. FlowScroll cannot activate scrolling enhancement in this session, and related controls are temporarily disabled.
main.scroll_engine_failed.title: Scroll Engine Failed
main.scroll_engine_failed.body: Failed to start the scroll engine. FlowScroll cannot produce scrolling output in this session.
main.preset.delete_confirm_body: Delete preset '{name}'? This cannot be undone.
main.update.release_tooltip: A newer stable release is available: v{version}
main.update.dev_tooltip: You are using a development build. Latest stable release: v{version}
tab.presets.title: Presets
tab.author: GitHub | CyrilPeng
dialog.reverse.title: Scroll Direction
dialog.work.title: Work Mode
dialog.work.subtitle: Choose between toggle activation and hold-to-activate. Both mouse buttons and keyboard shortcuts are supported.
dialog.work.mode_click_title: Single press to enable / press again to disable
dialog.work.mode_click_desc: Best for long reading sessions or other scenarios where scrolling mode should remain active for a while.
dialog.work.mode_hold_title: Active while pressed / disabled on release
dialog.work.mode_hold_desc: Best for temporary scrolling or more precise control, with automatic return to normal input behavior after release.
dialog.work.compat_mode: Delayed activation (short tap does not activate)
dialog.work.compat_hint: Recommended: 150~250ms to reduce unintended activation during actions such as closing a tab or window with the middle button.
dialog.filter.title: App Filter Mode
dialog.filter.subtitle: Use blacklist/whitelist rules based on process name to control where FlowScroll is enabled.
dialog.filter.mode_global_desc: Enabled for all apps (still affected by fullscreen disable).
dialog.filter.mode_blacklist_desc: One process-name keyword per line. Matched apps are disabled.
dialog.filter.mode_whitelist_desc: One process-name keyword per line. Only matched apps are enabled.
dialog.filter.hint: Import from text file; one keyword per line. Use stable process-name fragments such as chrome, code, or potplayer. If the current environment cannot identify the process name, FlowScroll temporarily falls back to window-title matching for the current foreground app only.
dialog.filter.use_regex: Enable regex matching (each rule is treated as a regex pattern)
dialog.filter.process_name_unavailable: The current environment cannot identify the process name. FlowScroll will fall back to window-title matching for the current foreground app.
dialog.inertia.title: Inertia Settings
dialog.inertia.subtitle: Tune glide feel after releasing activation key.
dialog.inertia.friction_desc: Higher value means longer glide time.
dialog.inertia.threshold_desc: Inertia starts only when release speed exceeds this value.
webdav.title: WebDAV Cloud Sync
webdav.keyring_unavailable_hint: System keyring is unavailable. The password will only be kept in memory for this session and will not be written to disk.
webdav.password_session_only:
System keyring is unavailable. The password is only stored in memory for this session.
You will need to enter it again next time.
webdav.saved_notice: WebDAV settings have been staged. Save the preset in the main window to persist them.
webdav.invalid_url: The WebDAV URL is invalid. Enter a full http:// or https:// address that points to a writable WebDAV directory.
webdav.http_error: WebDAV request failed. Server returned HTTP {status}: {reason}
webdav.timeout_hint: The WebDAV connection timed out. Check your network, server status, and whether the WebDAV URL is correct.
webdav.connection_refused_hint: The target server refused the connection. This usually means the address or port is wrong, the WebDAV service is not running, or the URL is not the actual WebDAV endpoint.
webdav.name_resolution_hint: The server address could not be resolved. Check the hostname and whether DNS/network access is available.
webdav.url_error_hint: Could not access the WebDAV URL: {error}
webdav.download_success: Configuration downloaded successfully. Restart the app or reload the preset to apply it.
webdav.download_failed:
Download failed. There may be no remote config file yet:
{error}
